stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What is the aircraft’s lateral offset configuration based on the CDU screen?

options.a: It is set up for a cross-track approach.
options.b: It is set up for a lateral offset of 2 NM to the right.
options.c: It is set up for a lateral offset of ±2 NM.
options.d: It is set up for a lateral offset of 2 NM to the left.
